scripts.render-build: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && CI= DISABLE_ESLINT_PLUGIN=true npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.restart: sh -c 'CI= DISABLE_ESLINT_PLUGIN=true npm --prefix frontend run build && (lsof -ti:5001 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true) && npm --prefix backend start'
